title: The Spy at the Table
tagline: Deal a no-app social-deduction game by printing seat QRs in one click.
holy_shit: Eight people can sit down, scan, and start accusing each other in under ten seconds — with no backend, no lobby code, no install.
powered_by: Zero-dependency qr.mjs seat cards + Web Crypto PIN locks + pure canvas/DOM reveal flow
agent_scenario: When you need: instant multi-player role dealing where each player privately reveals a secret from a static page without any backend.
author: kody-w + Copilot
